notes: Active - V9 modal (id: __domainSearchModal) titled 'Domain Search'. Shows an input field for a domain name and lists 8 sites that will be opened as tabs (Whoisology, BuiltWith, DNSlytics, host.io, DomainTools, ViewDNS WHOIS, ViewDNS Reverse IP, ViewDNS IP History). 'Launch All Tabs' button opens all. In headless CI the modal appears and no input is provided; no tabs open.
